nasb.text: When the lad was gone, David rose from the south side and fell on his face to the ground, and bowed three times. And they kissed each other and wept together, but David wept the more.

esv.text: And as soon as the boy had gone, David rose from beside the stone heap and fell on his face to the ground and bowed three times. And they kissed one another and wept with one another, David weeping the most.

cnv.text: 那童僕一離去，大衛就從石堆的南邊起來，臉伏於地，叩拜了三次。二人互相親吻，相對哭泣，大衛哭得更悲痛。

ccb.text: 少年离开以后，大卫就从磐石南面出来，伏地拜了三拜。二人彼此亲吻，抱头痛哭，大卫更是泣不成声。
